title: Titan Obsidian
description: Adds Titans-style obsidian equipment to Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, including the flight-capable obsidian sword and ultra-fast obsidian pickaxe, with more obsidian gear coming soon!
body:
# Obsidian Titans Gear
---
### ⚠️ Required Dependency
To use this mod, you must install **MixinExtras** first:
[MixinExtras (Neoforge/Forge Fix)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mixin-extras-neoforge-on-forge-fix)

This mod is made with MCreator.

---
# 🌏 中文介绍
本模组为《我的世界》Forge 1.20.1 版本添加了泰坦系列的黑曜石装备，完美弥补了当前泰坦生物模组缺少黑曜石装备的遗憾！

当前已添加的物品：
- **黑曜石剑**：还原《新泰坦生物》中黑曜石剑的核心功能，右键可触发飞行效果！
  - 攻击速度：1.6
  - 攻击伤害：50
  - 耐久度：0
- **黑曜石镐**：拥有超高速挖掘能力的顶级工具！
  - 挖掘速度：1.6
  - 耐久度：1001
- **黑曜石斧**：（暂未添加合成配方）
- 攻击速度：1.6
- 耐久度：5001
- 压缩黑曜石（装备合成材料）

未来更新计划：
我们将逐步补全[新泰坦生物](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-the-titans)模组中所有的黑曜石装备，打造完整的泰坦黑曜石装备体系！

---
# 🌏 English Description
This mod adds Titans-themed obsidian equipment to Minecraft 1.20.1 Forge, solving the problem that existing Titan creature mods lack obsidian gear in this version.

Currently included items:
- **Obsidian Sword**: Fully replicates the iconic flight ability from Neo The Titans' obsidian sword - right-click to activate flight!
  - Attack Speed: 100
  - Attack Damage: 50
  - Durability: 5001
- **Obsidian Pickaxe**: A top-tier tool with ultra-fast mining speed!
  - Mining Speed: 1.6
  - Durability: 1001
- Compact Obsidian (crafting material for obsidian gear)

Future Updates:
We will gradually add all remaining obsidian equipment from the [Neo The Titans](https://modrinth.com/mod/neo-the-titans) mod, to complete the full obsidian gear set!
